name: Normal Season Harvest
description: Manage a 2-zone wheat farm across a stable 30-day growing season. Irrigate correctly and harvest at peak ripeness to maximize yield.

action_schema.action_type: string — one of: irrigate, fertilize, pesticide, harvest, wait, sell
action_schema.amount: float — water litres for irrigate, tons for sell
action_schema.type: string — fertilizer type: nitrogen | phosphorus | potassium
action_schema.days: int — number of days to wait

observation_space.day: int — current day of season (1 to episode_days)
observation_space.market_prices: dict — crop prices for local and export markets

weather.event: string — rainy | dry | heatwave | normal | frost

zones.days_to_ready: int — estimated days until harvest ready

grader.description: Scores yield ratio, harvest timing accuracy, and water efficiency

success_criteria: Harvest at least 1 zone at growth_stage=4 (READY)
Keep crop_health above 0.5 for both zones
Stay within water budget of 200 litres
Generate positive revenue from selling harvested crops
